race.description: Cusack Hotel Group Family Day July 11Th Handicap
race.comment: EARTHSONG (11) resumed with a 5L fourth competing in a 2816m handicap at this venue. Looks capable of building on that effort with a win. TRUBSHAW (3) ended last year with an impressive 3.5L victory racing from the front over 2816m at The Curragh in October. Major player. CELTIC DRUID (19) has won tackling 2414m at Dundalk in each of his last two starts including when racing from off the pace before scoring by 2.5L more than two weeks ago. Rates a danger switching to turf. JUNIPER SLING (2) proved a disappointment running down field trying 2011m at Leopardstown making her handicap debut in October. Better expected in this event.
